situation: audit-2026-07-06-022 finding M-012: verifier.py:351 --output flag accepts any path without validation — attacker could write to /etc/cron.d/ or other sensitive locations via path traversal. Three call sites in extract/judge/verify subcommands all pass args.output directly to write_text (now _atomic_write_text in worktree).
action: Added _safe_output_path() helper that resolves the target path and validates it stays under CWD using Path.relative_to(). Wrapped all three _atomic_write_text(args.output, ...) call sites. Committed directly in diverged worktree opt-wechat-main-1783130541 per case-104 escape hatch (cp-guard blocked due to prior unmerged changes).
outcome_evidence: Commit 397651a on auto/opt-wechat-main-1783130541 pushed to origin. python3 py_compile passes. _safe_output_path rejects paths outside CWD with ValueError.
next_suggestion: Dispatch next pending fix M-013 (feedback_collector.py:70 JSONL append without flock). 5 pending fixes remain after this round.

audit_findings.finding: --output flag accepts arbitrary path without validation — allows writing outside project directory
audit_findings.remediation: Add _safe_output_path() that resolves target and validates under CWD via Path.relative_to()
